sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 43

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 43:1
items.html:
(to the question) Zivug Neshikin [coupling of kisses]
The Zivug of kisses is a Zivug [coupling] that corrects the first three [GaR] of the Partzuf. It is drawn from the new Light that pierced the Parsa, came out through the Tabur [navel] of AK, and illuminated the first three of Nekudim. But the seven lower Sefirot of Nekudim did not receive their correction until the Light descended through the Yesod of AK and illuminated the Yesodot of AVI of Nekudim; and this Zivug, which was for the sake of the seven lower ones, is called the Zivug of Yesodot. From then on these two Zivugim apply: the first, for the correction of the first three; and the second, for the correction of the seven lower ones. The first Zivug is also sometimes called the spiritual Zivug, or the upper Zivug; and the second is called the lower Zivug. (p. 745, Item 16)
